global_description: A small, slender bird with a streamlined body and a slightly forked tail. It has olive-gray upperparts and a contrasting white throat and belly. The wings are long and pointed, with darker flight feathers. The head is rounded with a short, broad bill.

part_details.head: Rounded, olive-gray with a short, broad bill.
part_details.body: Streamlined, olive-gray upperparts, white throat and belly.

spatial_relations: The wings extend from the sides of the body, tapering to a point.
The tail is positioned at the rear, slightly forked.
The head is at the front, rounded with a short bill.
